title: rubus rariflorus
intro: Rubus rariflorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of bramble native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rariflorus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
